rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when referring to ports, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use assign statements only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation contracts.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE annex blocks are placed in valid AADL scopes to preserve model integrity.
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use only assume and eq declarations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE logical operators include and, or, not(...), and implication =>.
Use const for constants and eq for equations with explicit types.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope; use only assume and eq declarations.
Do not reference AADL property names like Compute_Execution_Time or unit tokens directly in AGREE expressions.
